# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# Kong production configuration

# Database settings
database = postgres
pg_host = postgres
pg_port = 5432
pg_database = kong
pg_user = kong
pg_password = changeme
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = off

# Proxy listener for client traffic
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000 reuseport backlog=16384, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl http2 reuseport backlog=16384

# Admin API accessibility
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001 reuseport backlog=16384, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl http2 reuseport backlog=16384

# Logging
log_level = notice
proxy_access_log = /dev/stdout
proxy_error_log = /dev/stderr
admin_access_log = /dev/stdout
admin_error_log = /dev/stderr

# Performance and security
nginx_worker_processes = auto
trusted_ips = 127.0.0.1,::1
real_ip_header = X-Forwarded-For
real_ip_recursive = on

# Headers
headers = latency_tokens, server_tokens

# DNS
dns_order = LAST,A,CNAME
dns_stale_ttl = 3600

# SSL certificates
ssl_cert = /etc/kong/ssl/tls.crt
ssl_cert_key = /etc/kong/ssl/tls.key

# Misc
mem_cache_size = 256m
anonymous_reports = off
